creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
Final test result:
 - stock 10.1 gptzfsboot succeeds in booting my HP BL460c just fine, no patch needed.
 - 9.3 gptzfsboot fails with the "error 1" messages

so, for me this is fixed by just replacing gptzfsboot on all affected 9.3-RELEASE systems with the 10.1 binary.

Sorry for all the extra noise added to the ticket.
